narrative:
Precinct Chillicothe 1-A (precinct in Ross County) has 951 registered voters, with 54.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 24.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 21.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.0 percentage points.
